home.meta_title: FuelEcon — Gas Cost Calculator Canada | Plain-English Fuel Economy Tool
home.meta_description: Work out the real cost of any drive in plain English. FuelEcon shows your fuel use, trip cost, and the easy tweaks that save gas — in L/100km or MPG, your choice.
home.vehicle_card_blurb: Don't know your fuel economy? Pick your car from the dropdowns — we'll fill it in.
home.ev_notice_html: ⚡ Driving an EV? Gas calc doesn't apply — use our EV cost tool.
